for h in history:
    seg_h = h.frame.segmentation['nodes']
    whites = [(n['color'], n['bbox'][0], n['bbox'][1], n['bbox'][2], n['bbox'][3]) for n in seg_h if n['color'] == 'W']

        for w in whites:
